message:
test(ffs-cli): add btrfs CLI E2E tests (bd-65s0s)

Add 5 btrfs E2E tests for CLI commands:

- cli_inspect_btrfs_returns_json
- cli_inspect_btrfs_human_readable
- cli_info_btrfs_shows_superblock
- cli_fsck_btrfs_runs_without_crash
- cli_inspect_btrfs_subvolumes

Tests use real btrfs images via mkfs.btrfs.
All tests emit SCENARIO_RESULT markers.

Total CLI E2E tests now: 20 (15 ext4 + 5 btrfs)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
